name: plugin-doctor
description: Audit Codex plugin, custom-agent, and skill repositories for structural issues.

interface.shortDescription: Audit Codex plugin and skill repositories
interface.longDescription: Validate repo-local skills, optional packaged plugins, marketplace metadata, and custom agents while flagging stale Claude-specific leftovers.
defaultPrompt: Audit this repository for Codex plugin and skill structure issues.
Check whether packaged plugins and marketplace metadata are consistent.
Find stale Claude-specific artifacts that should be removed or documented.
